summary.headline: Bunge Global SA filed financial statements and pro forma information for the acquisition of Viterra Limited.
summary.narrative_summary: This filing provides audited consolidated financial statements of Viterra as well as unaudited pro forma combined financial information following Bunge's acquisition of Viterra.

ma_or_capital_allocation.counterparty: Viterra Limited and its shareholders including certain affiliates of Glencore PLC, Canada Pension Plan Investment Board, and British Columbia Investment Management Corporation
ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Acquisition completed on June 13, 2023, with shareholder approval at an extraordinary general meeting held on October 5, 2023.

extraction_notes: Numbers and dates from the financial statements in Exhibit 99.1; cover sheet only had Item references.
